name: Lorenzo Stacchio
role: Research Fellow · PhD in Computer Science
affiliation: Department of Political Sciences, Communication and International Relations (SPOCRI) — University of Macerata
lead: I work at the intersection of **Extended Reality (XR)** and **Artificial Intelligence (AI)**, designing _Extended Artificial Intelligence (XRAI)_ systems that support human activity across creative industries, cultural heritage and industrial production.
about: I am a Research Fellow (Assegnista di Ricerca, SSD IINF-05/A — Information Processing Systems) at the [VRAI Lab](https://vrailab.it/), University of Macerata, under the supervision of Prof. Emanuele Frontoni. My current research focuses on _consumer behaviour analysis in retail through top-view RGB-D cameras_.

I obtained a PhD in Computer Science at the University of Bologna in 2024 with the thesis [_Entangling artificial intelligence with extended reality paradigms for human activity support_](https://amsdottorato.unibo.it/11139/) (Advisor: Prof. Gustavo Marfia, Co-Advisor: Prof. Giuseppe Lisanti). I am Associate Editor of Springer's [The Visual Computer](https://link.springer.com/journal/371/editorial-board) and recipient of the **Springer Nature Editor of Distinction Award 2026**.
